title: Cometary Encounter
overview: Umika Konohoshi is a shy girl who has trouble talking to others, and dreams of making friends in outer space. On the first day of high school, she meets Yu, who claims to be an alien, and one who can read minds with telepathy!

title: Sunset Rocket
overview: Umika is excited to start building a rocket with Yu. However, she is then confronted by her classmate, Haruno, who just happened to spot Umika and Yu sneaking into a lighthouse after school...

title: Explosive Mechanic
overview: In their quest to build a rocket, Umika and her friends decide to visit Matataki, their classmate who is a skilled engineer, but doesn't attend classes. However, they soon find out that this mechanic's got one short fuse!

title: Clashing Seaside
overview: Haruno shows up with a surprise for Umika and Yu. The three of them prepare to face off against Matataki in a bottle rocket duel. The fate of Umika's rocketry dreams hangs in the balance!

title: Endless Dreamer
overview: Matataki convinces Umika and the others to start a school-sanctioned club to finance their rocketry endeavors. The next day, everyone in Umika's grade sets off on an overnight study camp.

title: Salutatory Initiation
overview: Matataki gives the others a crash course in model rocket building. Some time later, Umika and her friends attend a model rocketry festival, and run into a familiar face...

title: Daring Leadership
overview: Umika and the others begin to prepare for the upcoming model rocketry tournament. But they find out that in order to participate, all of them will need model rocket licenses!

title: Into Battle, Ultra High-Power Dream
overview: With both summer vacation and the regional qualifiers for the Model Rocket Championship drawing ever closer, tensions run high between Matataki and the rest of the group.

title: Planetary Gravity
overview: The Model Rocket Championship regional qualifiers have finally begun. Umika is struck with fear right before her speech in front of a crowd. Can she manage to pull herself together in time?

title: Crybaby Restart
overview: With summer vacation over, Umika must put on a brave face in front of the others after their loss. She soon learns that Matataki refuses to talk to anyone or come to school.

title: Rematching Seaside
overview: With Matataki still absent from school and shutting everyone out, Umika must find a way to get through to her. But first, they decide to enlist help from a familiar face...

title: Stardust Telepath
overview: Umika finds herself sick and bedridden. Yu, Haruno, and Matataki decide to pay her a visit, much to the surprise of Umika's sister, Honami.
